hasAttributes.name: activityId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the activity associated with the activity party. (A "party" is any person who is associated with an activity.)

hasAttributes.name: activityPartyId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the activity party.

hasAttributes.name: partyId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the party associated with the activity.

hasAttributes.name: partyObjectTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: The name of the entity linked by partyId

hasAttributes.name: participationTypeMask
hasAttributes.description: Role of the person in the activity, such as sender, to, cc, bcc, required, optional, organizer, regarding, or owner.

hasAttributes.name: addressUsed
hasAttributes.description: Email address to which an email is delivered, and which is associated with the target entity.

hasAttributes.name: doNotFax
hasAttributes.description: Information about whether to allow sending faxes to the activity party.

hasAttributes.name: scheduledStart
hasAttributes.description: Scheduled start time of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: scheduledEnd
hasAttributes.description: Scheduled end time of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: effort
hasAttributes.description: Amount of effort used by the resource in a service appointment activity.

hasAttributes.name: doNotEMail
hasAttributes.description: Information about whether to allow sending email to the activity party.

hasAttributes.name: doNotPostalMail
hasAttributes.description: Information about whether to allow sending postal mail to the lead.

hasAttributes.name: doNotPhone
hasAttributes.description: Information about whether to allow phone calls to the lead.

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: instanceTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: Type of instance of a recurring series.

hasAttributes.name: isPartyDeleted
hasAttributes.description: Information about whether the underlying entity record is deleted.

hasAttributes.name: addressUsedEmailColumnNumber
hasAttributes.description: Email address column number from associated party.

definitions.description: Person or group associated with an activity. An activity can have multiple activity parties.
